params.name: Isabella
params.description:
On Apr 4, 1499 AD, Leonardo da Vinci drew this sketch of Isabella d'Este while staying in the city of Mantua.
Portrait of Isabella d'Este, a pencil drawing by Leonardo da Vinci. Da Vinci used different shades of black, red, and brown to sketch the outlines and a rubbing brush to create shading on the face and hair. This sketch by Leonardo da Vinci exemplifies both his earlier artistic style and the aesthetic of his later works.
